---
title: "COFINFAD LAB <br> <span style='font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: 600;'>Interactive Analytics for Colombian Fintech Data</span>"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        /* Full-screen background image */
        body {
          background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)), 
                      url('vaa image.png') no-repeat center center fixed;
          background-size: cover;
        }

        h1.title {
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 4rem !important; /* Larger size for the main Lab name */
        font-weight: 800;
        line-height: 1.2; /* Prevents the two lines from overlapping */
        margin-top: 20vh;
        color: white;
        text-shadow: 2px 2px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
        }
        
        h1.title span {
        display: block; /* Forces it to its own line even without the <br> */
        margin-top: 10px;
        }

        /* 3. Make Header/Navbar Transparent */
        #quarto-header nav {
          background: transparent !important;
          border-bottom: none !important;
          box-shadow: none !important;
        }

        /* 4. Ensure Nav text is white for visibility */
        .navbar-brand, .nav-link {
          color: white !important;
        }

        /* Clear white backgrounds from main content container */
        .quarto-container, #quarto-content, main {
          background: transparent !important;
        }
        </style>
---
